headline: Here Are Wednesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: BILL Holdings, Cava Group, Entergy, GlobalFoundries, Hess Midstream, Nike, Pfizer, SharkNinja, STMicroelectronics, and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower after the stock market tried to take a cue from Monday’s action, and things didn’t work out quite as well on Tuesday. Once again, the market gapped open higher as the “Buy the dip” legions came in to ride what they thought would be another wave higher, only ...
